/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  --no-gnu-unique -Wreturn-type -O3 -DNDEBUG    -flto  -Wl,--disable-new-dtags   -shared -Wl,-soname,Body.so -o ../../../lib/choreonoid-2.2/python/cnoid/Body.so CMakeFiles/PyBody.dir/PyBodyModule.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PyBody.dir/PyBody.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PyBody.dir/PyLink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PyBody.dir/PyDeviceTypes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PyBody.dir/PyDeviceList.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PyBody.dir/PyMaterial.cpp.o   -L/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib  -L/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib/choreonoid-2.2  -L/usr/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu  -Wl,-rpath,/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib:/home/mrp/catkin_ws/build/choreonoid/lib/choreonoid-2.2:/usr/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu: ../../../lib/libCnoidBody.so.2.2 ../../../lib/libCnoidPyUtil.so.2.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so ../../../lib/libCnoidAISTCollisionDetector.so.2.2 ../../../lib/libCnoidUtil.so.2.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.a -lpthread -lm -ldl -lstdc++fs
